text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The king, felled by the princess's<n>blade! Oh, the
power of a revolution!<n>However, it is not enough to
defeat<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I turn to my potential eternal<n>adversary and say,
"Steel yourself<n>and stand tall as my nemesis!"
Such<n>words could be given to myself as<n>well.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Look around at what my feats have<n>produced—a
horde of enemies<n>threatening to hinder my true
stride.<n>Lo! A challenge worthy of a king if<n>I've
ever seen one!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Now is the time to press forward and<n>build a
dynasty. My nation will<n>witness its foundation at
the Japan<n>Cup!
